drills.title: Advantage Read: Kickout or Finish
drills.description: Human-authored catalog drill for reading help defense after creating an advantage.
coaching_cues: See the low help before the second dribble.
Deliver the pass on balance when the corner defender helps.
Finish strong when the lane stays open.
success_metrics: Eight correct read calls in ten reps.
Pass or shot decision made before the paint catch line.
No more than two late pickups per set.

drills.title: Pick-and-Roll Two-Read: Pocket or Skip
drills.description: Human-authored catalog drill for choosing between the roller pocket pass and weak-side skip.
coaching_cues: Read the tag defender before leaving your feet.
Keep the dribble alive until the passing window is clear.
success_metrics: Seven on-time passes in ten live reads.
Turnover or deflection on fewer than two reps.
Verbalize tag defender location after each rep.

drills.title: Transition Lane Advance Read
drills.description: Human-authored catalog drill for early advance passes and lane-fill decisions.
coaching_cues: Sprint wide before looking back to the ball.
Advance the ball when a teammate is ahead with a clean lane.
Flatten to the corner if the defense protects the rim.
success_metrics: Correct advance or flatten decision on eight of ten reps.
First pass thrown before the ball crosses half court when open.
Spacing lane maintained for the full rep.

drills.title: Closeout Contain: No Middle
drills.description: Human-authored catalog drill for controlled closeouts and containment angles.
coaching_cues: Show hands without leaving your feet.
Influence the ball away from the middle.
success_metrics: Middle drive allowed on fewer than two of ten reps.
Contest without fouling on eight of ten reps.
Recover stance within one step after the first move.

drills.title: Help, Tag, and Recover
drills.description: Human-authored catalog drill for help positioning, roller tags, and recovery timing.
coaching_cues: Load to the nail or gap before the drive starts.
Tag with body position, then see your matchup.
Recover with high hands on the pass out.
success_metrics: Correct tag or stunt on eight of ten reps.
Communicate help call on every rep.

drills.title: Spacing Read: Drift or Lift
drills.description: Human-authored catalog drill for off-ball relocation during baseline and slot drives.
coaching_cues: Move when the driver gets a shoulder past the defender.
Drift on baseline drives and lift on middle drives.
Be shot-ready before the pass arrives.
success_metrics: Correct relocation on eight of ten drive reads.
Feet set before catch on seven of ten reps.
No two players fill the same window.
